summary: Backend-only testing of SinAdicciones platform. All 24 API endpoint tests PASSED (100% success rate). Tested: login (patient/professional), emotional-logs (GET/POST), Nelson IA chat, professional/patients, professional/alerts, habits, profile, purpose/goals endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Using existing demo accounts in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working correctly. Patient has 90 emotional logs, 5 habits, 7 SMART goals. Professional has 2 linked patients (Carlos Demo, Miguel Paciente). Nelson IA chat using emergentintegrations is functioning correctly with proper context awareness.

POST /api/auth/login.notes: Both patient and professional login work correctly, returns session_token

GET /api/emotional-logs.notes: Returns list of 90 emotional logs for patient

POST /api/emotional-logs.notes: Creates new emotional log, updates if same date exists

POST /api/nelson/chat.notes: Nelson IA responds with context-aware messages, detects anxiety mode correctly

GET /api/professional/patients.notes: Returns 2 linked patients with recovery info (clean_since, addiction_type)

GET /api/professional/alerts.notes: Returns empty list (no active alerts for linked patients)

GET /api/habits.notes: Returns 5 habits with streak tracking and completion status

GET /api/profile.notes: Patient profile has triggers (4), protective_factors (4), clean_since date

GET /api/purpose/goals.notes: Returns 7 SMART goals with weekly_progress tracking and target_days

authentication_tests.unauthorized_access: PASS (all protected endpoints return 401 without token)
